content: Windows UXP plugin storage lives at %APPDATA%\Adobe\UXP\PluginsStorage\PHSP\<version>\. Community reports show CC-Desktop/UPIA-installed third-party plugins under a '...\External\<id>\' subfolder, distinct from the 'Plugin\<id>' path this project's old raw-copy install.ps1 assumed -- further evidence the raw-copy scripts targeted a path structure not authoritative for plugin discovery, consistent with Phase 1's macOS finding.
